initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  AND overall_rating > (
    SELECT AVG(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  )
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  AND overall_rating > (
    SELECT AVG(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  )
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT player_api_id

  AND overall_rating > (
    SELECT AVG(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  )
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  AND overall_rating > (
    SELECT AVG(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  );

SELECT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  AND overall_rating > (
    SELECT AVG(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes

  );

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH avg_rating_2010 AS (
  SELECT AVG(overall_rating) AS avg_rating
  FROM Player_Attributes
  WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
),
above_avg_players AS (
  SELECT player_api_id, overall_rating
  FROM Player_Attributes
  WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
    AND overall_rating > (SELECT avg_rating FROM avg_rating_2010)
)
SELECT player_api_id
FROM above_avg_players
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

candidates.sql:
WITH avg_rating_2010 AS (
  SELECT AVG(overall_rating) AS avg_rating
  FROM Player_Attributes
  WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
),
above_avg_players AS (
  SELECT pa.player_api_id, pa.overall_rating
  FROM Player_Attributes pa
  CROSS JOIN avg_rating_2010 ar
  WHERE pa.date LIKE '2010%'
    AND pa.overall_rating > ar.avg_rating
)
SELECT player_api_id
FROM above_avg_players
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH avg_rating_2010 AS (
  SELECT AVG(overall_rating) AS avg_rating
  FROM Player_Attributes
  WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
),
above_avg_players AS (
  SELECT player_api_id, overall_rating
  FROM Player_Attributes
  WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
    AND overall_rating > (SELECT avg_rating FROM avg_rating_2010)
)
SELECT player_api_id
FROM above_avg_players
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH avg_rating_2010 AS (
  SELECT AVG(overall_rating) AS avg_rating
  FROM Player_Attributes
  WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
)
SELECT pa.player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes pa, avg_rating_2010 ar
WHERE pa.date LIKE '2010%'
  AND pa.overall_rating > ar.avg_rating;

WITH avg_rating_2010 AS (
  SELECT AVG(overall_rating) AS avg_rating
  FROM Player_Attributes
  WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
)
SELECT pa.player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes pa, avg_rating_2010 ar
WHERE pa.date LIKE '2010%'
  AND pa.overall_rating > ar.avg_rating;
